title: rubus pruinosus
intro: Rubus pruinosus, also known as the Frost raspberry or Prickly raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. It is a deciduous shrub that is native to East Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus pruinosus include reducing blood sugar levels, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for consumption, as well as being used in traditional remedies such as salves and poultices.
